title: An enzymatic method for synthesis of interpeptide thioether crosslinks
abstract: The present disclosure is concerned with methods of generating interpeptide and intrapeptide thioether linkages and peptides made by such methods. Also disclosed are modified insulin analogs comprising intra- and/or interpeptide thioether linkages. This abstract is intended as a scanning tool for purposes of searching in the particular art and is not intended to be limiting of the present invention.
